name: spotify-music-streaming
description: A Spotify-style music streaming platform with user accounts, playlists, search, recommendations, and real-time playback sync across devices.

features.description: Email + password registration with email verification, OAuth (Google, Apple)
Profile with display name, avatar, bio, follower/following system
Artists, albums, tracks with metadata (duration, genre, release date, cover art)
Stream audio files with adaptive bitrate, range requests, and CDN integration
Create, edit, delete playlists. Collaborative playlists. Public/private visibility
Full-text search across tracks, artists, albums, playlists. Auto-suggest with debounce
Queue management: add, remove, reorder tracks. Shuffle, repeat modes
Track play history, recently played, most played. Used for recommendations
Personalized recommendations based on listening history, genre preferences, collaborative filtering
Follow artists/users, see friend activity, share tracks/playlists via link
Free (ads, limited skips) and Premium (no ads, offline, high quality). Stripe billing
Download tracks for offline playback (Premium only). Sync state across devices
